name: Creamy Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or kettle, combine the chicken broth (or bouillon), diced cooked chicken, milk, carrot, celery, green pepper, onion, garlic, dried marjoram, salt, and pepper.
2. Bring to a simmer over medium heat until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
3. Add the uncooked noodles and cook until they are almost done.
4. In a separate cup, whisk together the milk and flour until smooth.
5. Stir this mixture into the soup and continue cooking gently for 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the butter to finish.
